name: osrm-backend
description: Open Source Routing Machine - high performance routing engine

overrides.$comment: sol2 3.5.0 broke usertype_container with unordered_map<string,bool>; pin to last known-good.
overrides.name: sol2

overrides.$comment: Lua 5.5 is too new for sol2 3.3.1 (removed LUA_ERRGCMM, new lua_newstate signature). Pin to latest 5.4.
overrides.name: lua

overrides.$comment: Generated flatbuffers headers in generated/ are pinned to 25.9.23; vcpkg default is 25.12.19. Regenerate the .h files to move this pin forward.
overrides.name: flatbuffers
